title: Peloton Interactive Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Peloton Analyst Consensus and Recent Activity. Overall Consensus: Peloton Interactive Inc has a consensus price target of $10.93 based on the ratings of 24 analysts. Recent Upgrades: Goldman Sachs raised their price target to $11.5 on August 8, 2025, showing continued confidence in the turnaround. Baird raised PTON price target to $6 from $5.50, indicating modest positive momentum. Price Target Changes: Goldman Sachs raised to $8 from $7, while Citi lowered to $5 from $8.25, showing mixed sentiment on the stock. Divergent Views: The wide range of price targets reflects analyst disagreement about the success of Peloton's turnaround efforts and the sustainability of profitability improvements. Forward Outlook: Despite mixed reviews, more analysts maintain positive ratings than negative, suggesting overall confidence that the company can achieve its profitability and growth goals. Market Expectations: The consensus appears to be that Peloton is transitioning from a growth company to a profitable, cash-generating business.
